  "text": "In envoyproxy/envoy (v1.31.2), the xDS v2-to-v3 API migration is reflected across several layers of the codebase:\n\n**1. Versioned Proto Type Conversion and Field Renames (DiscoveryRequest)**\nThe proto files in `api/envoy/api/v2/discovery.proto` define the original v2 `DiscoveryRequest` (in package `envoy.api.v2`), while `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/discovery.proto` defines the v3 `DiscoveryRequest` (in package `envoy.service.discovery.v3`) with the UDPA annotation `option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type = \"envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest\"` documenting the rename. The v2 ADS service is defined in `api/envoy/service/discovery/v2/ads.proto` (using `envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest`), and the v3 equivalent in `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto` (using `envoy.service.discovery.v3.DiscoveryRequest`).\n\n**2. Dual-Version Subscription Handling in the ADS gRPC Client**\nThe Envoy proxy acts as an xDS client against an external management server. Two independent implementations handle the ADS gRPC protocol:\n- **SotW (State of the World)** — the original v2 model using `DiscoveryRequest`/`DiscoveryResponse`: implemented in `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_mux_impl.cc` (`GrpcMuxImpl` class), which calls `envoy.service.discovery.v3.AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources`.\n- **Delta xDS** — the v3 extension using `DeltaDiscoveryRequest`/`DeltaDiscoveryResponse`: implemented in `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/new_grpc_mux_impl.cc` (`NewGrpcMuxImpl`), which calls `DeltaAggregatedResources`.\n\nA unified implementation in `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.cc` provides `GrpcMuxSotw` and `GrpcMuxDelta` as template instantiations of a single `GrpcMuxImpl<S,F,RQ,RS>`, covering both `envoy::service::discovery::v3::DiscoveryRequest` (SotW) and `envoy::service::discovery::v3::DeltaDiscoveryRequest` (Delta) within one templated class.\n\nThe corresponding per-subscription state machines are:\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/sotw_subscription_state.cc` — `SotwSubscriptionState`, handles `DiscoveryResponse` and builds `DiscoveryRequest` ACK/NACKs with `version_info` and `response_nonce`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/delta_subscription_state.cc` — `DeltaSubscriptionState`, handles `DeltaDiscoveryResponse` and builds `DeltaDiscoveryRequest`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/delta_subscription_state.cc` — original (non-unified) delta state used by `NewGrpcMuxImpl`.\n\n**3. Type URL to gRPC Service Method Mapping**\n`source/common/config/type_to_endpoint.cc` builds a reverse map from v3 resource type URLs (e.g. `type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.cluster.v3.Cluster`) to the correct v3 gRPC service methods (`sotwGrpcMethod`, `deltaGrpcMethod`, `restMethod`). Comments in this file explicitly reference the historical v2 naming (e.g. `envoy.api.v2.RouteDiscoveryService`) to document the migration.\n\n**4. Transport API Version Enforcement**\n`source/common/config/utility.h` (`Utility::checkTransportVersion`) validates the `transport_api_version` field in `ApiConfigSource`. It explicitly rejects any value other than `AUTO` or `V3` (i.e. rejects the legacy `V2` enum value), emitting a deprecation warning that 'V2 xDS transport protocol version is deprecated... The v2 xDS major version has been removed.'\n\n**5. ADS Mux Orchestration**\n`source/common/upstream/cluster_manager_impl.cc` selects between SotW (`grpc_mux_factory` / `sotw_grpc_mux_factory`) and Delta (`new_grpc_mux_factory` / `delta_grpc_mux_factory`) factories at startup based on the configured `api_type` (`GRPC` vs `DELTA_GRPC`), then calls `checkTransportVersion` on the ADS config before creating the mux.\n\n**6. Proto Descriptor Validation**\n`source/server/proto_descriptors.cc` validates at startup that both `StreamAggregatedResources` and `DeltaAggregatedResources` v3 method descriptors are present in the binary.\n\n**7. Legacy Build/Link Infrastructure**\n`api/test/build/build_test.cc` is a C++ binary that validates all v2 method descriptors are still linked (e.g. `envoy.service.discovery.v2.AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources`), serving as a compatibility smoke test. `test/config/v2_link_hacks.h` forces linking of v2 proto stubs in test binaries."
}

# Envoy xDS v2 to v3 API Migration

## Your Task

Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement both xDS v2 and v3 API handling: the versioned proto type conversion, the v2-to-v3 field renames (e.g., DiscoveryRequest), and the dual-version subscription handling in the ADS gRPC server.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the migration domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2, sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367, sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6, sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e.


## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{

}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
Now I have enough information to compile the comprehensive answer. Let me write it:

The answer has been written to `/workspace/answer.json`. Here's a summary of my findings:

## Key C++ Source Files in envoyproxy/envoy for xDS v2→v3 Migration

### Versioned Proto Type Conversion & Field Renames
- **`api/envoy/api/v2/discovery.proto`** — v2 `DiscoveryRequest` (package `envoy.api.v2`)
- **`api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/discovery.proto`** — v3 `DiscoveryRequest` annotated with `previous_message_type = "envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest"`
- **`api/envoy/service/discovery/v2/ads.proto`** and **`v3/ads.proto`** — the actual v2/v3 ADS service definitions

### Dual-Version Subscription Handling (ADS gRPC)
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_mux_impl.cc` | SotW ADS (`DiscoveryRequest`/`DiscoveryResponse`) via `StreamAggregatedResources` |
| `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/new_grpc_mux_impl.cc` | Delta ADS (`DeltaDiscoveryRequest`) via `DeltaAggregatedResources` |
| `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.cc` | Unified mux templated for both SotW (`GrpcMuxSotw`) and Delta (`GrpcMuxDelta`) |
| `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/sotw_subscription_state.cc` | SotW state machine handling `DiscoveryResponse`/`DiscoveryRequest` |
| `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/delta_subscription_state.cc` | Delta state machine |

### Version Enforcement & Type Mapping
- **`source/common/config/utility.h`** — `checkTransportVersion()` rejects v2 transport API version
- **`source/common/config/type_to_endpoint.cc`** — maps resource type URLs to `sotwGrpcMethod`/`deltaGrpcMethod` v3 service methods (with v2 naming documented in comments)
- **`source/common/upstream/cluster_manager_impl.cc`** — orchestrates SotW vs Delta mux selection

  "text": "In envoyproxy/envoy (v1.31.2), the xDS v2-to-v3 API migration is reflected across several layers of the codebase:\n\n**1. Versioned Proto Type Conversion and Field Renames (DiscoveryRequest)**\nThe proto files in `api/envoy/api/v2/discovery.proto` define the original v2 `DiscoveryRequest` (in package `envoy.api.v2`), while `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/discovery.proto` defines the v3 `DiscoveryRequest` (in package `envoy.service.discovery.v3`) with the UDPA annotation `option (udpa.annotations.versioning).previous_message_type = \"envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest\"` documenting the rename. The v2 ADS service is defined in `api/envoy/service/discovery/v2/ads.proto` (using `envoy.api.v2.DiscoveryRequest`), and the v3 equivalent in `api/envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto` (using `envoy.service.discovery.v3.DiscoveryRequest`).\n\n**2. Dual-Version Subscription Handling in the ADS gRPC Client**\nThe Envoy proxy acts as an xDS client against an external management server. Two independent implementations handle the ADS gRPC protocol:\n- **SotW (State of the World)** — the original v2 model using `DiscoveryRequest`/`DiscoveryResponse`: implemented in `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_mux_impl.cc` (`GrpcMuxImpl` class), which calls `envoy.service.discovery.v3.AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources`.\n- **Delta xDS** — the v3 extension using `DeltaDiscoveryRequest`/`DeltaDiscoveryResponse`: implemented in `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/new_grpc_mux_impl.cc` (`NewGrpcMuxImpl`), which calls `DeltaAggregatedResources`.\n\nA unified implementation in `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.cc` provides `GrpcMuxSotw` and `GrpcMuxDelta` as template instantiations of a single `GrpcMuxImpl<S,F,RQ,RS>`, covering both `envoy::service::discovery::v3::DiscoveryRequest` (SotW) and `envoy::service::discovery::v3::DeltaDiscoveryRequest` (Delta) within one templated class.\n\nThe corresponding per-subscription state machines are:\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/sotw_subscription_state.cc` — `SotwSubscriptionState`, handles `DiscoveryResponse` and builds `DiscoveryRequest` ACK/NACKs with `version_info` and `response_nonce`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/delta_subscription_state.cc` — `DeltaSubscriptionState`, handles `DeltaDiscoveryResponse` and builds `DeltaDiscoveryRequest`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/delta_subscription_state.cc` — original (non-unified) delta state used by `NewGrpcMuxImpl`.\n\n**3. Type URL to gRPC Service Method Mapping**\n`source/common/config/type_to_endpoint.cc` builds a reverse map from v3 resource type URLs (e.g. `type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.cluster.v3.Cluster`) to the correct v3 gRPC service methods (`sotwGrpcMethod`, `deltaGrpcMethod`, `restMethod`). Comments in this file explicitly reference the historical v2 naming (e.g. `envoy.api.v2.RouteDiscoveryService`) to document the migration.\n\n**4. Transport API Version Enforcement**\n`source/common/config/utility.h` (`Utility::checkTransportVersion`) validates the `transport_api_version` field in `ApiConfigSource`. It explicitly rejects any value other than `AUTO` or `V3` (i.e. rejects the legacy `V2` enum value), emitting a deprecation warning that 'V2 xDS transport protocol version is deprecated... The v2 xDS major version has been removed.'\n\n**5. ADS Mux Orchestration**\n`source/common/upstream/cluster_manager_impl.cc` selects between SotW (`grpc_mux_factory` / `sotw_grpc_mux_factory`) and Delta (`new_grpc_mux_factory` / `delta_grpc_mux_factory`) factories at startup based on the configured `api_type` (`GRPC` vs `DELTA_GRPC`), then calls `checkTransportVersion` on the ADS config before creating the mux.\n\n**6. Proto Descriptor Validation**\n`source/server/proto_descriptors.cc` validates at startup that both `StreamAggregatedResources` and `DeltaAggregatedResources` v3 method descriptors are present in the binary.\n\n**7. Legacy Build/Link Infrastructure**\n`api/test/build/build_test.cc` is a C++ binary that validates all v2 method descriptors are still linked (e.g. `envoy.service.discovery.v2.AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources`), serving as a compatibility smoke test. `test/config/v2_link_hacks.h` forces linking of v2 proto stubs in test binaries."
}

Dual-Version Subscription Handling in the ADS gRPC Client**\nThe Envoy proxy acts as an xDS client against an external management server. Two independent implementations handle the ADS gRPC protocol:\n- **SotW (State of the World)** — the original v2 model using `DiscoveryRequest`/`DiscoveryResponse`: implemented in `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/grpc_mux_impl.cc` (`GrpcMuxImpl` class), which calls `envoy.service.discovery.v3.AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources`.\n- **Delta xDS** — the v3 extension using `DeltaDiscoveryRequest`/`DeltaDiscoveryResponse`: implemented in `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/new_grpc_mux_impl.cc` (`NewGrpcMuxImpl`), which calls `DeltaAggregatedResources`.\n\nA unified implementation in `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/grpc_mux_impl.cc` provides `GrpcMuxSotw` and `GrpcMuxDelta` as template instantiations of a single `GrpcMuxImpl<S,F,RQ,RS>`, covering both `envoy::service::discovery::v3::DiscoveryRequest` (SotW) and `envoy::service::discovery::v3::DeltaDiscoveryRequest` (Delta) within one templated class.\n\nThe corresponding per-subscription state machines are:\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/sotw_subscription_state.cc` — `SotwSubscriptionState`, handles `DiscoveryResponse` and builds `DiscoveryRequest` ACK/NACKs with `version_info` and `response_nonce`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/xds_mux/delta_subscription_state.cc` — `DeltaSubscriptionState`, handles `DeltaDiscoveryResponse` and builds `DeltaDiscoveryRequest`.\n- `source/extensions/config_subscription/grpc/delta_subscription_state.cc` — original (non-unified) delta state used by `NewGrpcMuxImpl`.\n\n**3. Type URL to gRPC Service Method Mapping**\n`source/common/config/type_to_endpoint.cc` builds a reverse map from v3 resource type URLs (e.g. `type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.cluster.v3.Cluster`) to the correct v3 gRPC service methods (`sotwGrpcMethod`, `deltaGrpcMethod`, `restMethod`). Comments in this file explicitly reference the historical v2 naming (e.g. `envoy.api.v2.RouteDiscoveryService`) to document the migration.\n\n**4. Transport API Version Enforcement**\n`source/common/config/utility.h` (`Utility::checkTransportVersion`) validates the `transport_api_version` field in `ApiConfigSource`. It explicitly rejects any value other than `AUTO` or `V3` (i.e. rejects the legacy `V2` enum value), emitting a deprecation warning that 'V2 xDS transport protocol version is deprecated... The v2 xDS major version has been removed.'\n\n**5. ADS Mux Orchestration**\n`source/common/upstream/cluster_manager_impl.cc` selects between SotW (`grpc_mux_factory` / `sotw_grpc_mux_factory`) and Delta (`new_grpc_mux_factory` / `delta_grpc_mux_factory`) factories at startup based on the configured `api_type` (`GRPC` vs `DELTA_GRPC`), then calls `checkTransportVersion` on the ADS config before creating the mux.\n\n**6. Proto Descriptor Validation**\n`source/server/proto_descriptors.cc` validates at startup that both `StreamAggregatedResources` and `DeltaAggregatedResources` v3 method descriptors are present in the binary.\n\n**7. Legacy Build/Link Infrastructure**\n`api/test/build/build_test.cc` is a C++ binary that validates all v2 method descriptors are still linked (e.g. `envoy.service.discovery.v2.AggregatedDiscoveryService.StreamAggregatedResources`), serving as a compatibility smoke test. `test/config/v2_link_hacks.h` forces linking of v2 proto stubs in test binaries."
